question: Based on the area chart of site visits from 2018 to 2022, which statement is best supported?

options.A: Site visits increased each year from 2018 through 2020.
options.B: Site visits were highest in 2019 and then declined.
options.C: Site visits in 2020, 2021, and 2022 were all equal.
options.D: Site visits decreased steadily from 2018 to 2022.

explanation: The visible y-range is set below the maximum value, so the top three bars are truncated and looks identical.
